result.reason: Users need a reliable way to transfer all settings to a new computer, which is currently hampered by an incomplete settings upgrade mechanism.
result.approach: Implement a comprehensive settings migration mechanism in SettingsLoader.cs by dynamically finding and upgrading all ApplicationSettingsBase subclasses to ensure all user-defined settings are correctly transferred or upgraded.
